mapper.insert: Insert into t_emp(emp_no, name, gender, pwd, email) values(#{empNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{pwd}, #{email})
mapper.delete:
delete from t_emp where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select e.*, t.team_name teamName, r.role_name roleName from t_emp e left join t_emp_team et on e.id = et.emp_id left join t_emp_role er on e.id = er.emp_id left join t_team t on t.id = et.team_id left join t_role r on r.id = er.role_id where e.id = #{id}
select count(*) from t_emp where team_id = #{id}
select count(*) from t_emp where role_id = #{id}

select e.*, t.team_name teamName, r.role_name roleName from t_emp e left join t_emp_team et on e.id = et.emp_id left join t_emp_role er on e.id = er.emp_id left join t_team t on t.id = et.team_id left join t_role r on r.id = er.role_id
